label: Screen context • Slack focused draft + selection
notes: A chat scene with a real Slack title ('engineering (Channel) - Osaurus - Slack'): the active channel surfaces as behavior ('Active: channel engineering' parsed from the '(Channel)' title), the focused composer carries a draft and a selection (both must surface), and the recent messages show up as on-screen content. Proves the focused-input path for a non-editor app (textfield, no viewport) plus the title-derived channel signal.
